title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on a clear day】

whistle, scat & humming

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Velas – Quincy Jones" into "Velas Içadas – Ivan Lins".

Please enjoy the refreshing spring-like harmonica and the tones like the South American wind blowing through.

今回は「VELAS - QUINCY JONES」から「Velas Içadas · Ivan Lins」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
春らしい爽やかなハーモニカと吹き抜ける南米の風のような音色をお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZxoSOhQEXVU
